title: Minecraft Reborn
description: The Winged Redcat's Vanilla+ reimagining of Minecraft.
body:
## Minecraft Reborn is a Vanilla+ reimagining of Minecraft, reimagining the world, items, animations, & graphics to feel modern, updated, & interesting.

### List of Mods used:
- 3D Skin Layers
- AppleSkin
- Chat Heads
- ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Villages
- Dungeons & Taverns
- Fresh Animations (+ extras)
- First Person Model
- And more!

**THE MODPACK IS IN ALPHA, BUGS & CRASHES MAY HAPPEN.**
